ORDER RE PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO AMEND AND CORRECT MEMO OF COSTS AFTER JUDGMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF CREDIT & DECLARATION OF ACCRUED INTEREST (GRANTED)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF THOMAS HOLTON'S MOTION TO AMEND AND CORRECT MEMORANDUM OF COSTS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. (CCP 473(A)(1).) PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL ADMITS HIS MISTAKE IN FILING THE PREVIOUS MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AFTER JUDGMENT. (AUERBACH DECL., 7.) PLAINTIFF IS PERMITTED TO FILE A MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND CREDITS (FORM MC-012) CORRECTING THE ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF TOTAL CREDIT TO DATE (INCLUDING RETURNS ON LEVY PROCESS AND DIRECT PAYMENTS) FROM THE AMOUNT OF $ 6,600.00 TO $ 5,800.00. (SEE JUD. COUNCIL FORM MC-012, 4.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

calendar.matters:
Mtn To Amend And Correct Memo Of Costs
Off Calendar Mar-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: DENIS KLAVDIANOS, ESQ., 415.291.8320, FOR PLAINTIFF THOMAS HOLTON; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF THOMAS HOLTON's Motion To Amend And Correct Memorandum Of Costs is Granted. No opposition filed and for good cause shown. (CCP 473(a)(1).) Plaintiff's counsel admits his mistake in filing the previous Memorandum of Costs After Judgment. (Auerbach Decl., 7.) Plaintiff is permitted to file a Memorandum of Costs and Credits (Form MC-012) correcting the acknowledgment of total credit to date (including returns on levy process and direct payments) from the amount of $ 6,600.00 to $ 5,800.00. (See Jud. Council Form MC-012, 4.) Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
